_comment: Connection-manifest for the Graphics department. verify-wiring.sh reads this file and checks each required cfg_key.

connection_points.name: kie-api-key
connection_points.description: Kie.ai API key for AI image generation used by graphics production roles.

connection_points.name: ghl-api-key
connection_points.description: GoHighLevel API key for uploading finished graphics assets to the GHL media library.

connection_points.name: ghl-location-id
connection_points.description: GHL location ID for targeting the correct media library sub-account.
